# Overview

This is the landing page for the test corpus consumed by `book_test.go`.

## What it covers

A handful of headings, a code block, and a callout — enough surface for the
indexer to walk without exercising every Obsidian extension.

```go
fmt.Println("hello, help")
```

## Sub-section with caps

Wikilink-fragment slugs lower-case and dash-join words; the indexer must
match that convention so cross-document `#anchors` resolve.
